overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character exploring a dark urban environment at night. The scene transitions from an outdoor construction area with futuristic vehicles, through a neon-lit alleyway, into a graffiti-covered basement, and finally descends toward a red-lit interior space.

events.description: camera moves past the body and turns toward the dark alley entrance

agents.ego_description: moving past a white sports car and a body on the ground, heading toward a narrow passage

notable_agents.action: white sports car parked with driver door open
dead body lying face down in a pool of blood near construction barriers

entered.detail: red and white plastic construction barriers blocking off the area
industrial metal storage racks with supplies
large metal roll-up garage door with green and red panels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a construction area at night with red ambient lighting. A white sports car sits with its door open near a corpse lying in a pool of blood. The player moves past construction barriers and industrial shelving, turning toward a dark alley entrance.

events.description: moving deeper into the alley where red neon lights cast strong glow on walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow dark alleyway illuminated by red neon lighting

entered.detail: bright red neon light strips mounted on building walls casting crimson glow
construction scaffolding overhead and along the alley walls
exposed red brick wall surfaces with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow alleyway enclosed by brick walls and metal scaffolding overhead. Red neon lights bathe the scene in crimson light as the camera moves forward through the confined passage toward a doorway at the end.

events.description: entering building doorway from the alley into darkness
beginning descent down concrete stairs into the basement level

agents.ego_description: entering a building and descending a concrete stairwell into a basement level

entered.detail: bare concrete stairs descending into darkness with metal railings
green-tinted light visible through windows or openings in the wall
rusted metal handrails along the concrete stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the neon-lit alley into a dark building interior, the player descends a concrete stairwell. Green light glows faintly through side openings as the camera moves downward toward a basement level.

events.description: entering the basement room with scattered trash and graffiti-covered walls
passing bloodstains and debris while exploring the concrete room

agents.ego_description: moving through a concrete basement room examining graffiti and scattered debris

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
scattered cardboard, bottles, and garbage littering the floor
dark red blood stains on the concrete floor
overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the basement
large octagonal concrete structural column in the room center

segments.scene_description: The player enters a basement room illuminated by fluorescent lights. The concrete walls are covered in colorful graffiti and the floor is littered with trash and bloodstains. A large octagonal concrete pillar stands near the center as the camera explores the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairwell toward red-lit club interior

events.description: beginning descent toward the lower level with intense red lighting
approaching the red-lit interior space at the bottom of the stairs

agents.ego_description: descending stairs toward a red-lit interior space, possibly a club or bar

entered.detail: passage leading to interior space with intense red neon lighting
red and purple lights from what appears to be a bar or club area

segments.scene_description: The player descends another level through a stairwell with graffiti-covered walls, approaching a space bathed in intense red neon light. The environment transitions from the dimly lit basement to a corridor leading toward what appears to be a club or bar interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a grim outdoor construction site into the depths of a neon-drenched underground complex. It begins in a red-lit industrial area, moving past a white sports car and a corpse before turning toward the mouth of a dark alley. As the camera enters the narrow passage, the environment tightens between brick walls and metal scaffolding under a heavy crimson neon glow, leading directly into a building interior. The scene then shifts downward through a concrete stairwell where faint green light flickers, opening into a trash-strewn basement room defined by fluorescent lighting and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera descends another level through a graffiti-lined corridor, transitioning from the dim basement into a space bathed in intense red neon light.
